scholar.name: Old Scholar
scholar.greeting: Ah, a fellow explorer! These ruins hold many secrets...

dialogueOptions.response: This dungeon has three floors. Each floor has a boss guarding the exit. Defeat them or find another way past.
Take this health potion. You'll need it.
Good luck, adventurer. You'll need it.

merchant.name: Crystal Merchant
merchant.greeting: Welcome! I have wares if you have crystals...

dialogueOptions.response: A wise purchase! Here you go.
